rationale: The cited paper is in the same market-response modeling stream (dynamic own/competitive marketing-mix effects including distribution/price), so it could plausibly serve as prior model/mechanism context. However, the citing note emphasizes cross-national elasticities via error-correction/SUR models and does not mention mind-set metrics or VARX/GFEVD specifically, and the evidence is only a DOI match with no citation-context text.
